title: List batches
content:
Meilisearch groups compatible tasks ([asynchronous operations](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations)) into batches for efficient processing.

For example, multiple docu

title: Get batch
content:
Meilisearch groups compatible tasks ([asynchronous operations](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations)) into batches for efficient processing.

For example, multiple docu

title: Get settings of a chat workspace
Reset the settings of a chat workspace
Update settings of a chat workspace
Create dump
content: Trigger a dump creation process. When complete, a dump file is written to the [dump directory](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/self_hosted/configure_meilisearch_at_launch#dump-directory). The d

title: List search rules
content: Return all search rules configured on the instance.

title: Get a search rule
content: Retrieve a single search rule by its unique identifier.

title: Delete a search rule
content: Delete a search rule by its unique identifier.

title: Create or update a search rule
content: Partially update a search rule by replacing the provided fields. If the rule doesn't exist, it will be created.

title: List experimental features
content: Return all experimental features that can be toggled via this API, and whether each one is currently enabled or disabled.

title: Configure experimental features
content: Enable or disable experimental features at runtime.

title: Export to a remote Meilisearch
content: Trigger an export that sends documents and settings from this instance to a remote Meilisearch server. Configure the remote URL and optional API key in the request body.

title: Get health
content:
The health check endpoint enables you to periodically test the health of your Meilisearch instance. Returns a simple status indicating that the server is available.

The engine will return `available`

title: List all indexes
content: Returns a paginated list of indexes. Use the `offset` and `limit` query parameters to page through results.

title: Create index
content:
Create a new index with an optional [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key).

If no primary key is provided, Meilisearch will [infer one](https://www.meilisea

title: Get index
content: Retrieve the metadata of a single index: its uid, [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key), and creation/update timestamps.

title: Delete index
content: Permanently delete an index and all its documents, settings, and task history.

title: Update index
content:
Update the [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key) or uid of an index.

Returns an error if the index does not exist or if it already contains documents ([pri

title: Compact index
content:
Trigger a compaction process on the specified index.

Compaction reorganizes the index database to reclaim space and improve read performance.

title: List documents with GET
content:
Retrieve documents in batches using query parameters for offset, limit, and optional filtering.

**Deprecated:** This endpoint will be deprecated in a future release. Use `POST /indexes/{index_uid}/do

title: Add or replace documents
content:
Add a list of documents or replace them if they already exist.

If you send an already existing document (same id) the whole existing document will be
overwritten by the new document. Fields previousl

title: Add or update documents
content:
Add a list of documents or update them if they already exist.

If you send an already existing document (same id) the old document will
be only partially updated according to the fields of the new doc

title: Delete all documents
content: Permanently delete all documents in the specified index. Settings and index metadata are preserved.

title: Delete documents by filter
content: Delete all documents in the index that match the given filter expression.

title: Delete documents by batch
content: Delete multiple documents in one request by providing an array of [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key) values.

title: Edit documents by function
content:
Use a [RHAI function](https://rhai.rs/book/engine/hello-world.html) to edit one or more documents directly in Meilisearch. The function receives each document and returns the modified document.

This

title: List documents with POST
content:
Retrieve a set of documents with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination. Use the request
body to specify filters, sort order, and which fields to return.

**Note:** Sending an empty payload (`{}`

title: Get document
content: Retrieve a single document by its [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key) value.

title: Delete document
content: Delete a single document by its [primary key](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/getting_started/primary_key).

title: Search for facet values
content:
Search for facet values matching a query within a given facet attribute. Use this to build
autocomplete or dropdown UIs for facet filters.

**Prerequisite:** The `facetName` attribute must be in the i

title: List index fields
content: Returns a paginated list of fields in the index with their metadata: whether they are displayed, searchable, sortable, filterable, distinct, have a custom ranking rule (asc/desc), and for filterable f

title: Search with GET
content:
Search for documents matching a query in the given index.

> Equivalent to the [search with POST route](/docs/reference/api/search/search-with-post) in the Meilisearch API.

**Note:** By default this

title: Search with POST
content:
Search for documents matching a query in the given index.

> Equivalent to the [search with GET route](/docs/reference/api/search/search-with-get) in the Meilisearch API.

**Note:** By default this en

title: List all settings
content: Returns all settings of the index. Each setting is returned with its current value or the default if not set.

title: Reset all settings
content: Resets all settings of the index to their default values.

title: Update all settings
content:
Updates one or more settings for the index. Only the fields sent in the body are changed. Pass null for a setting to reset it to its default. If the index does not exist, it is created.

See also: [Co

title: Get chat
content: Returns the current value of the `chat` setting for the index.

title: Reset chat
content: Resets the `chat` setting to its default value.

title: Update chat
content: Updates the `chat` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Get dictionary
content: Returns the current value of the `dictionary` setting for the index.

title: Update dictionary
content: Updates the `dictionary` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset dictionary
content: Resets the `dictionary` setting to its default value.

title: Get displayedAttributes
content: Returns the current value of the `displayedAttributes` setting for the index.

title: Update displayedAttributes
content: Updates the `displayedAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset displayedAttributes
content: Resets the `displayedAttributes` setting to its default value.

title: Get distinctAttribute
content: Returns the current value of the `distinctAttribute` setting for the index.

title: Update distinctAttribute
content: Updates the `distinctAttribute` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset distinctAttribute
content: Resets the `distinctAttribute` setting to its default value.

title: Get embedders
content: Returns the current value of the `embedders` setting for the index.

title: Reset embedders
content: Resets the `embedders` setting to its default value.

title: Update embedders
content: Updates the `embedders` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Get facetSearch
content: Returns the current value of the `facetSearch` setting for the index.

title: Update facetSearch
content: Updates the `facetSearch` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset facetSearch
content: Resets the `facetSearch` setting to its default value.

title: Get faceting
content: Returns the current value of the `faceting` setting for the index.

title: Reset faceting
content: Resets the `faceting` setting to its default value.

title: Update faceting
content: Updates the `faceting` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Get filterableAttributes
content: Returns the current value of the `filterableAttributes` setting for the index.

title: Update filterableAttributes
content: Updates the `filterableAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset filterableAttributes
content: Resets the `filterableAttributes` setting to its default value.

title: Get foreignKeys
content: Returns the current value of the `foreignKeys` setting for the index.

title: Update foreignKeys
content: Updates the `foreignKeys` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset foreignKeys
content: Resets the `foreignKeys` setting to its default value.

title: Get localizedAttributes
content: Returns the current value of the `localizedAttributes` setting for the index.

title: Update localizedAttributes
content: Updates the `localizedAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset localizedAttributes
content: Resets the `localizedAttributes` setting to its default value.

title: Get nonSeparatorTokens
content: Returns the current value of the `nonSeparatorTokens` setting for the index.

title: Update nonSeparatorTokens
content: Updates the `nonSeparatorTokens` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset nonSeparatorTokens
content: Resets the `nonSeparatorTokens` setting to its default value.

title: Get pagination
content: Returns the current value of the `pagination` setting for the index.

title: Reset pagination
content: Resets the `pagination` setting to its default value.

title: Update pagination
content: Updates the `pagination` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Get prefixSearch
content: Returns the current value of the `prefixSearch` setting for the index.

title: Update prefixSearch
content: Updates the `prefixSearch` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset prefixSearch
content: Resets the `prefixSearch` setting to its default value.

title: Get proximityPrecision
content: Returns the current value of the `proximityPrecision` setting for the index.

title: Update proximityPrecision
content: Updates the `proximityPrecision` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset proximityPrecision
content: Resets the `proximityPrecision` setting to its default value.

title: Get rankingRules
content: Returns the current value of the `rankingRules` setting for the index.

title: Update rankingRules
content: Updates the `rankingRules` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset rankingRules
content: Resets the `rankingRules` setting to its default value.

title: Get searchCutoffMs
content: Returns the current value of the `searchCutoffMs` setting for the index.

title: Update searchCutoffMs
content: Updates the `searchCutoffMs` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset searchCutoffMs
content: Resets the `searchCutoffMs` setting to its default value.

title: Get searchableAttributes
content: Returns the current value of the `searchableAttributes` setting for the index.

title: Update searchableAttributes
content: Updates the `searchableAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset searchableAttributes
content: Resets the `searchableAttributes` setting to its default value.

title: Get separatorTokens
content: Returns the current value of the `separatorTokens` setting for the index.

title: Update separatorTokens
content: Updates the `separatorTokens` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset separatorTokens
content: Resets the `separatorTokens` setting to its default value.

title: Get sortableAttributes
content: Returns the current value of the `sortableAttributes` setting for the index.

title: Update sortableAttributes
content: Updates the `sortableAttributes` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset sortableAttributes
content: Resets the `sortableAttributes` setting to its default value.

title: Get stopWords
content: Returns the current value of the `stopWords` setting for the index.

title: Update stopWords
content: Updates the `stopWords` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset stopWords
content: Resets the `stopWords` setting to its default value.

title: Get synonyms
content: Returns the current value of the `synonyms` setting for the index.

title: Update synonyms
content: Updates the `synonyms` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Reset synonyms
content: Resets the `synonyms` setting to its default value.

title: Get typoTolerance
content: Returns the current value of the `typoTolerance` setting for the index.

title: Reset typoTolerance
content: Resets the `typoTolerance` setting to its default value.

title: Update typoTolerance
content: Updates the `typoTolerance` setting for the index. Send the new value in the request body; send null to reset to default.

title: Get similar documents with GET
content:
Retrieve documents similar to a reference document identified by its id.

> Useful for “more like this” or recommendations.

title: Get similar documents with POST
content:
Retrieve documents similar to a reference document identified by its id.

> Useful for “more like this” or recommendations.

title: Get stats of index
content: Return statistics for a single index: document count, database size, indexing status, and field distribution.

title: List API keys
content:
Return all API keys configured on the instance. Results are paginated and can be filtered by offset and limit. The key value itself is never returned after creation.

**Note:** Expired keys are includ

title: Create API key
content:
Create a new API key with the specified name, description, actions, and index scopes. The key value is returned only once at creation time; store it securely.

**Required fields:** `actions`, `indexes

title: Get API key
content: Retrieve a single API key by its `uid` or by its `key` value.

title: Delete API key
content: Permanently delete the specified API key. The key will no longer be valid for authentication.

title: Update API key
content:
Update the name and description of an API key.

Updates are partial: only the fields you send are changed, and any fields not present in the payload remain unchanged.

**Note:** Only `name` and `descr

title: Update target of the console logs
content: Configure at runtime the level of the console logs written to stderr (e.g. debug, info, warn, error).

title: Retrieve logs
content: Stream logs over HTTP. The format of the logs depends on the configuration specified in the payload. The logs are sent as multi-part, and the stream never stops, so ensure your client can handle a lon

title: Stop retrieving logs
content: Call this route to make the engine stop sending logs to the client that opened the `POST /logs/stream` connection.

title: Get Prometheus metrics
content: Return metrics for the engine in Prometheus format. This is an [experimental feature](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/experimental/overview) and must be enabled before use.

title: Perform a multi-search
content:
Run multiple search queries in a single API request.

Each query can target a different index, so you can search across several indexes at once and get one combined response.

**Warning:** If Meilisea

title: Get network topology
content: Return the list of Meilisearch instances currently known to this node (self and remotes).

title: Configure network topology
content: Add or remove remote nodes from the network. Changes apply to the current instance’s view of the cluster.

title: Network control
content:
Send messages to control the progress of a network topology change task.

The route is mostly used internally when sending a PATCH to the network, but is accessible for manual control as well.

title: Create snapshot
content: Trigger a snapshot creation process. When complete, a snapshot file is written to the snapshot directory. The directory is created if it does not exist.

title: Get stats of all indexes
content: Return statistics for the Meilisearch instance and for each index. Includes database size, last update time, document counts, and indexing status per index.

title: Swap indexes
content:
Swap the documents, primary key, settings, and task history of two or more indexes.

Indexes are swapped in pairs; a single request can include multiple pairs.
The operation is atomic: either all swap

title: List tasks
content: The `/tasks` route returns information about [asynchronous operations](https://docs.meilisearch.com/learn/advanced/asynchronous_operations.html) (indexing, document updates, settings changes, and so o

title: Delete tasks
content: Permanently delete [tasks](https://docs.meilisearch.com/learn/advanced/asynchronous_operations.html) matching the given filters. You must provide at least one filter (e.g. `uids`, `indexUids`, `status

title: Cancel tasks
content: Cancel enqueued and/or processing [tasks](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations). You must provide at least one filter (e.g. `uids`, `indexUids`, `statuses`) to specify

title: Compact task queue
content:
Trigger a compaction process on the task queue database and return its size before and
after compaction. A successful compaction requires restarting the instance before it can
safely resume normal wri

title: Get task
content: Retrieve a single [task](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations) by its uid.

title: Get task's document payload
content:
Retrieve the document payload that was sent with this [task](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/async/asynchronous_operations).
Only available for document-related tasks that are enqueued or proce

title: Get version
content: Return the current Meilisearch version, including the commit SHA and build date.

title: List webhooks
content: Return all webhooks registered on the instance. Each webhook is returned with its URL, optional headers, and UUID (the key value is never returned).

title: Create webhook
content: Register a new webhook to receive task completion notifications. You can optionally set custom headers (e.g. for authentication) and configure the callback URL.

title: Get webhook
content: Retrieve a single webhook by its UUID.

title: Delete webhook
content: Permanently remove a webhook by its UUID. The webhook will no longer receive task notifications.

title: Update webhook
content: Update the URL or headers of an existing webhook identified by its UUID.

title: AllBatches
content: Response containing a paginated list of batches

title: AllTasks
content: Response containing a paginated list of tasks

title: AttributePatterns
content:
A collection of patterns used to match attribute names. Patterns can
include wildcards (`*`) for flexible matching. For example, `title`
matches exactly, `overview_*` matches any attribute starting wi

title: BatchStats
content: Statistics for a batch of tasks

title: BatchStatsView
content:
Provides comprehensive statistics about a batch's execution.

Includes task counts, status breakdowns, and AI embedder usage. This
information is useful for monitoring system performance and understan

title: BatchView
content: Represents a batch of tasks that were processed together.

title: BrowseQuery
content:
Request body for browsing and retrieving documents from an index. Use
this to fetch documents with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.
This is useful for displaying document lists, exporting

title: ChatChoice
content: A chat completion choice generated by the model.

title: ChatChoiceLogprobs
content: Log probability information for a chat completion choice.

title: ChatCompletionAudio
content: Parameters for audio output. Required when audio output is requested with `modalities: ["audio"]`.

title: ChatCompletionAudioFormat
content: Specifies the output audio format. Must be one of `wav`, `mp3`, `flac`, `opus`, or `pcm16`.

title: ChatCompletionAudioVoice
content: The voice the model uses to respond in audio output.

title: ChatCompletionFunctionCall
content: Deprecated in favor of `tool_choice`. Controls which (if any) function is called by the model.

title: ChatCompletionFunctions
content: Deprecated: A function the model may generate JSON inputs for. Use `ChatCompletionTool` instead.

title: ChatCompletionMessageToolCall
content: A tool call generated by the model.

title: ChatCompletionModalities
content:
Output types that you would like the model to generate for this request.

Most models are capable of generating text, which is the default: `["text"]`

The `gpt-4o-audio-preview` model can also be use

title: ChatCompletionNamedToolChoice
content: Specifies a tool the model should use. Use to force the model to call a specific function.

title: ChatCompletionRequestAssistantMessage
content: An assistant message in the conversation, possibly including tool calls.

title: ChatCompletionRequestAssistantMessageAudio
content: Data about a previous audio response from the model, used in multi-turn conversations.

title: ChatCompletionRequestAssistantMessageContent
content: The contents of an assistant message: either a text string or an array of content parts (text or refusal).

title: ChatCompletionRequestAssistantMessageContentPart
content: A content part in an assistant message (text or refusal).

title: ChatCompletionRequestDeveloperMessage
content: A developer message in the conversation.

title: ChatCompletionRequestDeveloperMessageContent
content: The contents of a developer message: either a text string or an array of text content parts.

title: ChatCompletionRequestFunctionMessage
content: Deprecated: A function response message. Use tool messages instead.

title: ChatCompletionRequestMessage
content: A message in the chat completion conversation. Tagged by `role` (system, user, assistant, tool, developer, or function).

title: ChatCompletionRequestMessageContentPartAudio
content: Learn about [audio inputs](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/audio).

title: ChatCompletionRequestMessageContentPartImage
content: An image content part of a message.

title: ChatCompletionRequestMessageContentPartRefusal
content: A refusal content part of a message.

title: ChatCompletionRequestMessageContentPartText
content: A text content part of a message.

title: ChatCompletionRequestSystemMessage
content: A system message setting the behavior of the assistant.

title: ChatCompletionRequestSystemMessageContent
content: The contents of a system message: either a text string or an array of text content parts.

title: ChatCompletionRequestSystemMessageContentPart
content: A content part in a system message (text only).

title: ChatCompletionRequestToolMessage
content: Tool message

title: ChatCompletionRequestToolMessageContent
content: The contents of a tool message: either a text string or an array of text content parts.

title: ChatCompletionRequestToolMessageContentPart
content: A content part in a tool message (text only).

title: ChatCompletionRequestUserMessage
content: A user message in the conversation.

title: ChatCompletionRequestUserMessageContent
content: The contents of a user message: either a text string or an array of content parts (text, image, or audio).

title: ChatCompletionRequestUserMessageContentPart
content: A content part in a user message (text, image, or audio).

title: ChatCompletionResponseMessage
content: A chat completion message generated by the model.

title: ChatCompletionResponseMessageAudio
content: Audio data in a chat completion response message.

title: ChatCompletionSource
content: LLM provider for chat completions

title: ChatCompletionStreamOptions
content: Options for streaming response. Only set this when you set `stream: true`.

title: ChatCompletionTokenLogprob
content: Log probability information for an output token.

title: ChatCompletionTool
content: A tool the model may call. Currently, only functions are supported as a tool.

title: ChatCompletionToolChoiceOption
content:
Controls which (if any) tool is called by the model.
`none` means the model will not call any tool and instead generates a message.
`auto` means the model can pick between generating a message or call

title: ChatCompletionToolType
content: The type of a tool. Currently, only `function` is supported.

title: ChatSearchParams
content: Search parameters applied when the LLM queries this index.

title: ChatSettings
content: [Chat (conversation)](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/chat/getting_started_with_chat) settings: how the index is described to the LLM and how it is queried.

title: ChatWorkspaceSettings
content: Settings for a chat workspace

title: CompletionTokensDetails
content: Breakdown of tokens used in a completion.

title: CompletionUsage
content: Usage statistics for the completion request.

title: ComputedFacets
content: Computed facet data from a search

title: CreateChatCompletionRequest
content: A chat completion request compatible with the OpenAI API.

title: CreateChatCompletionResponse
content: Represents a chat completion response returned by model, based on the provided input.

title: DetailsView
content:
Contains type-specific details about a task's execution.

The fields present depend on the task type. For example, document addition
tasks will have `receivedDocuments` and `indexedDocuments`, while s

title: DistributionShift
content:
Describes the mean and sigma of distribution of embedding similarity in the embedding space.

The intended use is to make the similarity score more comparable to the regular ranking score.
This allows

title: DocumentDeletionByFilter
content: Request body for deleting documents by filter

title: DocumentEditionByFunction
content: Request body for editing documents using a RHAI function

title: EmbedderStatsView
content: Statistics for embedder requests

title: EmbeddingSettings
content: Embedder configuration for [AI-powered / hybrid search](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/ai_powered_search/getting_started_with_ai_search).

title: Export
content: Request body for exporting data to a remote Meilisearch instance

title: ExportIndexSettings
content: Export settings for a specific index

title: FacetSearchQuery
content: Request body for searching facet values

title: FacetSearchResult
content: Result of a facet search operation.

title: FacetStats
content:
Minimum and maximum numeric values for a facet.

Present when the facet attribute has numeric values among matching documents.

title: FacetValueHitSchema
content: Schema representation of a facet value hit (for OpenAPI documentation only).

title: FacetingSettings
content: Faceting: maximum number of facet values and how they are sorted.

title: FederatedSearch
content:
Request body for federated multi-search across multiple indexes. This
allows you to execute multiple search queries in a single request and
optionally combine their results into a unified response. Us

title: FederatedSearchResult
content: Response from a federated multi-search query

title: Federation
content: Configuration for federated multi-search

title: FederationOptions
content: Options for federated multi-search queries

title: FilterFeatures
content:
Controls which filter operators are allowed for an attribute. This
provides fine-grained control over filtering capabilities.

title: FilterableAttributesFeatures
content:
Controls which filtering and faceting operations are enabled for matching
attributes. This allows restricting certain operations on specific fields
for security or performance reasons.

title: FilterableAttributesPatterns
content:
Defines a set of attribute patterns with specific filtering and faceting
features. This allows fine-grained control over which operations are
allowed on matched attributes.

title: FinishReason
content: The reason the model stopped generating tokens.

title: FunctionCall
content: The name and arguments of a function that should be called, as generated by the model.

title: FunctionName
content: A wrapper for a function name reference.

title: FunctionObject
content: A function definition for tool use, described as a JSON Schema object.

title: GetLogs
content: Request body for streaming logs

title: HitsInfo
content: Pagination information for search results.

title: HybridQuery
content: Hybrid search: balance between keyword and semantic search.

title: ImageDetail
content: Specifies the detail level of the image.

title: ImageUrl
content: An image URL with optional detail level.

title: ImportData
content: Import data stored in a task

title: IndexCreateRequest
content: Request body for creating a new index

title: IndexStats
content: Stats of an `Index`, as known to the `stats` route.

title: IndexSwap
content: Index swap operation

title: IndexView
content: An index containing searchable documents

title: InputAudio
content: Input audio data for an audio content part.

title: InputAudioFormat
content: The format of the encoded audio data.

title: KeyView
content:
Represents an API key used for authenticating requests to Meilisearch.
Each key has specific permissions defined by its actions and can be scoped
to particular indexes. Keys provide fine-grained acces

title: Kind
content: The type of the task.

title: ListFieldsFilter
content: Filter fields by attribute name patterns or by capability (displayed, searchable, sortable, etc.). All criteria are ANDed.

title: LocalizedAttributesRuleView
content:
Defines a rule for associating specific locales (languages) with
attributes. This allows Meilisearch to use language-specific tokenization
and processing for matched attributes, improving search quali

title: LogMode
content: Format for log output

title: MatchBounds
content:
Represents the position of a matching term in a document field. Used to
indicate where query terms were found within attribute values, enabling
features like highlighting and match position display.

title: MatchingStrategy
content: Strategy used to match query terms within documents

title: MergeFacets
content:
Options for merging facets from multiple indexes in federated search.
When multiple indexes are queried, this controls how their facet values
are combined into a single facet distribution.

title: MinWordSizeTyposSetting
content:
Minimum word length required before typos are allowed.

This helps prevent matching very short words with typos, which can lead to irrelevant results.

title: Network
content: Network topology configuration for distributed Meilisearch

title: Origin
content:
Information about the origin of a task in a distributed Meilisearch
deployment. This tracks where a task was originally created before being
replicated to other nodes.

title: PaginationSettings
content: Pagination: cap on how many results a search can return.

title: PatchApiKey
content:
Request body for updating an existing API key. Only the name and
description can be modified - other properties like actions, indexes,
and expiration are immutable after creation.

title: Personalize
content:
Configuration for [personalized search](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/personalization/making_personalized_search_queries) results.

When enabled, results are tailored to the user profile desc

title: PredictionContent
content: Static predicted output content, such as the content of a text file that is being regenerated.

title: PredictionContentContent
content: The content that should be matched when generating a model response. If generated tokens would match this content, the entire model response can be returned much more quickly.

title: ProgressStepView
content:
Information about a single processing step within a batch or task. Each
step has a name, current progress, and total items to process.

title: ProgressView
content:
Real-time progress information for a batch or task that is currently
being processed. Use this to display progress bars or status updates to
users.

title: PromptTokensDetails
content: Breakdown of tokens used in a completion.

title: ReasoningEffort
content: Constrains effort on reasoning for reasoning models. Supported values are `low`, `medium`, and `high`.

title: Remote
content: Configuration for a remote Meilisearch instance

title: RemoteTask
content:
Represents a task that was replicated to a remote Meilisearch instance.
Contains either the remote task UID on success, or an error if
replication failed.

title: ResponseFormat
content: An object specifying the format that the model must output (text, JSON object, or JSON schema).

title: ResponseFormatJsonSchema
content: A JSON Schema-based response format specification for Structured Outputs.

title: Role
content: The role of the author of a message.

title: RuntimeTogglableFeatures
content: Experimental features that can be toggled at runtime

title: SearchHit
content: A single search result hit.

title: SearchMetadata
content: Metadata about a search query (included when requested via header).

title: SearchQueryWithIndex
content: A `SearchQuery` + an index UID and optional FederationOptions.

title: SearchResult
content: Search response containing matching documents and metadata.

title: SearchResultWithIndex
content: Search result with index identifier for multi-search responses

title: SearchResults
content: Response containing results from multiple search queries

title: ServiceTier
content: Specifies the latency tier to use for processing the request.

title: ServiceTierResponse
content: The service tier used for processing the request, as returned in the response.

title: SettingEmbeddingSettings
content:
Configuration for one [embedder](https://www.meilisearch.com/docs/learn/ai_powered_search/getting_started_with_ai_search) used for semantic and hybrid search.

Set `source` (`openAi`, `huggingFace`, `

title: Settings_Checked
content:
Index settings: every option you can configure for search and index behavior.

Used as the request body for PATCH settings. Only the fields you send are updated; pass `null` to reset a setting to its

title: Settings_Unchecked
content:
Index settings: every option you can configure for search and index behavior.

Used as the request body for PATCH settings. Only the fields you send are updated; pass `null` to reset a setting to its

title: Shard
content:
Configuration for a named shard of the network

Documents are distributed among the various declared shards.
Remotes own shards, meaning they own the documents that belong to these shards.

title: SimilarQuery
content: Request body for similar document search

title: SimilarResult
content: Response containing similar documents

title: Stats
content: Global statistics for the Meilisearch instance

title: Status
content: The status of a task.

title: Stop
content: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

title: SubEmbeddingSettings
content: Sub-embedder config for composite embedders. Used by `indexingEmbedder` (vectorize documents at index time) and `searchEmbedder` (vectorize queries at search time). Same fields as a top-level embedder

title: SummarizedTaskView
content: A summarized view of a task, returned when a task is enqueued

title: SwapIndexesPayload
content: Request body for swapping two indexes

title: TaskView
content:
Represents the current state and details of an asynchronous task.

Tasks are created when you perform operations like adding documents,
updating settings, or creating indexes. Use this view to monitor

title: TopLogprobs
content: A most likely token and its log probability at a given position.

title: TypoSettings
content: Typo tolerance: how spelling mistakes in queries are handled.

title: UpdateIndexRequest
content: Request body for updating an existing index

title: UpdateStderrLogs
content: Request body for updating stderr log configuration

title: WebhookResults
content: Response containing a list of all registered webhooks.

title: WebhookSettings
content: Configuration for a webhook endpoint

title: WebhookWithMetadataRedactedAuthorization
content: Webhook object with metadata and redacted authorization headers.

title: Introduction
content: This is a Sourcey-generated docs site for Meilisearch, an ultra-fast, open-source search engine written in Rust.

title: Quickstart
content: This site was built with Sourcey 3.6.5 using the `openapi` and `markdown` adapters.
